zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Crichton於1443年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar35歲，母親Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson29歲。她和Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles至少有3個兒子。她去世於1495年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Crichton于1443年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾桑哈爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar35岁，母亲Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson29岁。她和Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles至少有3个儿子。她去世于1495年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Crichton was born in 1443, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, was 29. She had at least 3 sons with Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. She died in 1495, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Crichton est née en 1443, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. Elle est décédée en 1495, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Crichton 1443 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar 35 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson 29. Sie hatte mit Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1495 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Crichton è nata il nel 1443 nel Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. Morì nel 1495, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crichtonが1443年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharは35歳，母Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonは29歳であった。彼女はLord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terreglesとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1495年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Crichton(이)가 1443년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Crichton nasceu em 1443, em Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. Ela faleceu em 1495, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Crichton родилась в 1443 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. Она умерла в 1495 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Crichton nació en 1443, en Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Lord David Herries 5th Lord Of Terregles. Murió en 1495, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
